name: Gwen's World of Weird
overview: Gwen's World of Weird presented by AT&T features wannabe YouTube celebrity Gwen and her psychic best friend, Janey Beth Walker. As mysteries unfold at their high school, Gwen has her camera trained on Janey Beth - thinking Janey Beth's predictions are her shot at fame. Unfortunately, Janey Beth never sees anything worthwhile..but in this weird world, it’s the small predictions that really add up to crack the case.

trailers.title: Gwen's World Of Weird - Official Trailer 2018
